log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:11+3=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:17+-2=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Githzerai — Iron Concentration.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Githzerai — Iron Concentration.
--- Githzerai — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Ogre (disadvantage protects concentration).

→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:10+-2=8 vs DC 15] FAIL! 7 psychic damage. HP: 52/59
